description_long: This is a rectangular, mid-rise office building with a flat roof and a minimalist, utilitarian facade. The exterior is primarily composed of light gray concrete or stucco, punctuated by a grid of evenly spaced, square windows on all sides. The ground floor features a slightly recessed base with a darker, weathered appearance and a central entrance flanked by vertical columns. The roof is flat and finished with a brownish, tiled surface, and includes a few small rooftop fixtures such as vents or pipes. The overall design is stark and functional, with little ornamentation, reflecting a focus on practicality over aesthetics. There is some subtle weathering and discoloration on the lower facade, suggesting exposure to urban elements.
description: A rectangular, gray office building with a grid of square windows and a flat, brown-tiled roof. The facade is minimalist and functional, with a recessed ground floor entrance and subtle weathering.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, grid of windows, and the recessed, darker ground floor.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, uniform window pattern, and rooftop fixtures.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, but without a visible entrance, showing the same window grid and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with rooftop fixtures and consistent window arrangement, no entrance visible.
attribute_window_pattern: Uniform grid of square windows, evenly spaced in horizontal and vertical rows on all facades.
